channel.title: Omni View — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from Omni View podcast episodes. Daily balanced news summaries from diverse sources.

item.description: Escalating Iran conflict triggers global energy crisis warnings, market turmoil, and emergency government meetings.
Trump considers winding down Iran war while easing sanctions on Iranian oil as Israel strikes Tehran targets and global energy prices surge.
Oil prices fall as U.S. considers releasing sanctioned Iranian crude while Israel-Iran conflict disrupts global energy markets.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran war escalates with US embassy attack in Baghdad and global inflation fears prompting rate hikes.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran denies its supreme leader's death amid escalating US-Israel strikes and global oil disruptions.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: US bombs Iran's Kharg Island oil hub as Middle East conflict escalates.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Four US service members killed in Iraq plane crash as Middle East war escalates with Iranian drone strikes.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran strikes oil tankers in the Gulf, surging prices to $100 a barrel amid escalating US-Israel conflict.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz amid US-Israel-Iran war, escalating global oil supply fears.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Trump claims Iran war could end soon but threatens escalation if oil supplies are disrupted.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran's new supreme leader vows escalated attacks as oil surges past $120 amid Gulf strikes.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: US and Israeli strikes ignite oil depots in Tehran, escalating the Middle East war into its second week.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran's drone attack on Dubai airport escalates Middle East conflict as Israel strikes Tehran.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran escalates attacks on US assets in the Middle East as the conflict with the US and Israel enters its fourth day.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran escalates Middle East attacks, hitting Saudi oil refinery and downing US F-15 jets in Kuwait friendly fire blunder.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: US and Israel kill Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei in airstrikes, igniting retaliatory attacks across the Middle East.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Bill Clinton testified before Congress on his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, denying any wrongdoing amid ongoing scrutiny.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Pakistan bombs Kabul, declares 'open war' on Afghanistan amid escalating border clashes.
